text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I might not've been first, but that race sure
was exciting!
choice_data_list: We can't let ourselves get complacent.

Hehe! I might not've been first, but that race sure

choice_data_list: We can't let ourselves get complacent.
We can't let ourselves get complacent.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I'm right there with ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna snag first place in my next race, then
throw a big ol' party to celebrate!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So swing on by when it happens, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh... You're right about that. Otherwise, I'll never
come out on top!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I can't be settlin' for just good enough!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Soon as I take first place, I'm gonna throw a party
to celebrate! ♪
